content:
National Legal Services Authority Internship Programme-2026: Apply by July 31
For more join: 
Linkledln : https://lnkd.in/ddyZJe86
Telegram : https://lnkd.in/g_murnTw
Youtube : https://lnkd.in/dE29Uxax
comment: Legal internships like this can be most impactful when students engage with the realities of access to justice, client interactions, and institutional processes—not just the legal framework.
